templateMeta.title: IoT environmental sensor
templateMeta.description: Battery-powered connected sensor for temperature, humidity, and air quality with cloud dashboard.

checklistContexts: Help facility managers monitor indoor air quality and ambient conditions without running new wiring.
Building operations teams and property managers for mid-size commercial spaces.
Battery life ≥ 24 months, wireless range suitable for one floor, BOM target under $30.
Cloud dashboard + mobile pairing; offline local buffering for at least 24 hours of samples.
Target FCC/CE for intentional radiator; no medical claims.
Accurate readings, multi-year battery life, simple install, and reliable cloud alerts.
MVP ships temperature + humidity; CO2 and VOC as stretch options.
checklistFeatures:
Use case: Continuous room monitoring

How to use: Mount on wall, power on, pair via mobile app.

Operating condition: Indoor 0–40°C, 10–90% RH non-condensing.

Acceptance criteria: Report every 5 minutes with ±0.5°C / ±3% RH accuracy.

Metrics: Packet success rate, battery drain per day.

Use case: Threshold alerts

How to use: Configure thresholds in cloud dashboard.

Operating condition: Online connectivity required for push alerts.

Acceptance criteria: Alert within 2 minutes of threshold breach.

Metrics: Alert latency, false positive rate.
